latest.title: JetBlue to reduce Newark, LaGuardia footprint as it forges ahead in Fort Lauderdale
latest.summary: JetBlue is planning to cut crew bases at Newark Liberty International Airport in New Jersey and New York's LaGuardia Airport.

radar.title: Watch: Trump speaks at G7 summit after threatening Iran
radar.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump said Wednesday at the G7 conference that the U.S. will "go right back to dropping bombs" if he doesn't like the Iran deal.

radar.title: Serial killer who murdered eight women in Long Island town imprisoned for life

radar.title: Target, Walmart and Amazon among brands losing LGBTQ+ consumer spending, new survey says
radar.summary: LGBTQ+ consumers are shifting spending toward companies they view as supporting DEI and away from those seen as retreating, HRC survey finds.
